skillDiscovery.title: Curious if your game's improving?
skillDiscovery.titleSignedUp: You're in! Want to track your game?

signup.heading: Sign up
signup.inviteError: We can't find "{name}" on the list yet — double-check the spelling, or ask the friend who shared this app to add you.
signup.networkError: Can't reach the server — check your connection and try again.
signup.offline: You're offline — reconnect to sign up.
signup.nameRequired: Add your name to sign up
signup.pinRequired: Set a 4-digit PIN to sign up
signup.pinHint: Required. Use this PIN to recover access if you change phones.
signup.genericFailure: That didn't go through — give it another try.
signup.waitlistFailure: That didn't go through — try the waitlist again.
signup.pinRequired: This name has a PIN. Sign in instead.
signup.pinMismatch: Those two don't match — give it another go.
signup.pinTooCommon: Pick a different PIN — try something less common.

pinPrompt.cardBody: Use this to manage your account and access your stats.
pinPrompt.sheetBody: This 4-digit PIN lets you restore your access on a new device and unlocks per-player stats.

states.finishedBody: Sign up for next week will be announced soon.

cost.label: Estimated cost
cost.notFinalized: Not finalized — the final cost is set after the session, and changes as more players join.

welcome.title: Welcome to BPM Badminton
welcome.invite: 🎟️ Invite-only — your name needs to be added
welcome.payment: 💵 Pay your share via e-transfer after the session
welcome.help: Ask the player who shared this with you for help.

roster.count: {count, plural, =0 {No players yet} one {# player signed up} other {# players signed up}}

admin.title: Admin
admin.signInHelp: Sign in with your name and PIN
admin.signInErrorRateLimited: Let's pause a moment — try again in 15 minutes.
admin.signInErrorNetwork: Can't reach the server right now.

profile.anonymousBody: Sign in with your name and PIN, or set up an account.
profile.anonymousSignInErrorRateLimited: Let's pause a moment — try again shortly.
profile.anonymousSignInErrorAdminLogged: Signed in as admin — sign out first to recover a player account.
profile.anonymousSignInErrorNetwork: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

createAccount.title: Create your account
createAccount.body: Set a name and PIN. You can sign up for sessions afterward.
createAccount.errorMismatch: Those two don't match — give it another go
createAccount.errorRateLimited: Let's pause a moment — try again in an hour.
createAccount.errorNetwork: Can't reach the server — check your connection and try again.
createAccount.errorPinProblem: Pick a different PIN — try something less common that you'll remember.
createAccount.errorTryLater: Couldn't save right now. Try again in a moment.
createAccount.errorAccountExists: An account with this name already exists. Sign in instead.
createAccount.errorInviteOnly: We can't find that name on the list yet — ask the admin to add you.

profile.pinUpdateFailed: That didn't save — give your PIN another go.
profile.pinNeedsSignIn: Sign up for this week first — it re-activates your account on this device so you can set a PIN.
profile.pinWrongCurrent: That current PIN doesn't match — give it another go.
profile.pinRateLimited: Let's pause a moment — try again in an hour.

report.title: Report a problem
report.help: Something not working? Tell me what happened and I'll take a look.
report.success: Thanks — got it. I'll look into it.

install.title: Add BPM to your home screen
install.intro: Save BPM to your home screen and it opens full-screen, like a normal app.
install.bannerTitle: Add BPM to your home screen

ios.step1: Tap the Share button in Safari's toolbar.
ios.step2: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen".
ios.step3: Tap "Add" — BPM lands on your home screen.
ios.note: On Android, open the browser menu (⋮) and tap "Add to Home screen" instead.

android.step1: Tap the menu (⋮) in your browser's toolbar.
android.step3: Confirm — BPM lands on your home screen.
android.note: On iPhone, tap the Share button in Safari, then "Add to Home Screen" instead.

pin.mismatch: Those two don't match — give it another go

stats.heading: Your stats
stats.subhead: Interesting metrics that you didn't ask for (beta)

level.title: Your level
level.purpose: One read on where your game is right now — just for you.
level.empty: Take a skill check-in to see your level.
level.error: Couldn't load that — refresh to try again
level.needsAuth: Sign in again to see your level.
level.onTrack: On track for {phase} — confirm it at your next check-in.

compare.above: Your recent games are landing above your check-in — nice. Bump your next check-in up if that feels right.
compare.below: Your check-in is a touch ahead of recent games — a strong week or two will bring them in line.

drills.title: Practice this week
drills.purpose: Concrete drills for the skills you're working on — just for you.
drills.error: Couldn't load that — refresh to try again
drills.needsAuth: Sign in again to see your drills.

kudos.giveHint: Give a shout-out to who you played with tonight.
kudos.offline: You're offline — reconnect to send kudos.
kudos.error: Couldn't load that — refresh to try again

progression.title: Skill progression (self tracking)
progression.subtitle: Preview only — data may get lost.
progression.disclaimer: Tap a category to see your skill level description. Source: <link>Ace Badminton Club</link>

attendance.title: Your Attendance
attendance.subtitle: Sessions played in the past year.

cost.title: Cost related
cost.subtitle: Spend per session, paid vs. owed, e-transfer recap.

partners.title: Partner and play style
partners.subtitle: Who you play with most + favoured patterns.

assess.purpose: Rate every few weeks to watch your trend move.
assess.empty: No check-in yet — take your first to start tracking your game.
assess.baseline: Baseline saved — check in again after a few sessions to watch it move.
assess.error: Couldn't load that — refresh to try again
assess.noGames: No games logged recently — just rate where your game is now.
assess.ratePrompt: Rate where your game is now. Pick the description that fits; skip anything you're unsure of.
assess.saveError: That didn't save — give it another go.
assess.signedOutBody: Sign in to rate your skills and watch them improve over time.
assess.switchCallout: You're right at the Switch — the crossover from "I play badminton" to "I train for badminton." Deliberate practice now is what moves you up.
assess.readGeneric: Here's where your game stands right now.
assess.holdingSteady: Holding steady — no big moves since last check-in.

players.empty: No one's signed up yet — be the first!
players.cancelFailure: That didn't go through — give it another try.
players.loadError: Couldn't load that — refresh to try again.

releases.howItWorks: Paste raw notes (or refresh from CHANGELOG), draft bilingual copy with AI, edit if needed, then publish — appears on the Home tab for all players.

recovery.pinPathHelp: Enter the PIN you set when signing up.
recovery.codePathHelp: Ask the admin for a 6-digit code, then enter it here.
recovery.haveCodeLink: Have a recovery code from admin?
recovery.errorRateLimited: Let's pause a moment — try again shortly.
recovery.errorAdminLoggedIn: Signed in as admin — sign out first to recover a player account.
recovery.errorNetwork: Couldn't reach the server. Try again.
